items.title: ‘We thought you were dead’ – West Ham fans chant at forgotten star, 29, as he makes first club appearance for two years
items.summary: WEST HAM fans have come up with a hilarious chant for a forgotten star after he finally made an appearance after a two-year absence. The Hammers are preparing for their first season in the Championship in over a decade as they take part in a series of pre-season friendlies. https://www.tiktok.com/@n
